questions.hindi: तोता हरे रंग का होता है।
options: The sparrow is sitting on the roof.
The parrot is green in colour.
questions.answer: The parrot is green in colour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "तोता हरे रंग का होता है।" = "The parrot is green in colour."

questions.sentence: The sparrow is _____ on the roof.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "The sparrow is sitting on the roof."

questions.sentence: The peacock are India's national bird.

questions.answer: The peacock is India's national bird.
